floor_history.headline: Recon: vT40 floor=4 reproduces on main (canonical C, 178/179); the handoff's active lever (rich-pass permuter workspace + triage + all session-10 tooling) was LOST with the bb2-work-marion worktree an

Structural axis for the pair-swap measured CLOSED: 26 forms swept (geometry/decl-order/type/staging), floor stays 4; NEW mechanism fact — shift-merged-into-load geometry moves the sched2 tie WITHOUT t

Structural s3: decoupled-addu family measured DEAD (22 new forms); pair-swap seat-trade proven invariant to deref position, arg5val life, web decomposition, and plus-operand canonicalization - addu-ea

Permuter s4: campaign rebuilt on main (vT40 base, permuter 220 = masked 4); sampler found the FIRST honest 179-insn region-3 steal-kill (dst2 alias-merge, masked 17; +sanctioned saved split-init = mas

Permuter s5: harvested the two s4-carryover campaigns; alias-merge family further confirmed CLOSED (permuter 85 = masked 14, permuter 95-2 = masked 15 — deeper permuter progress trades MORE seats, wor

Forensics s6: pair-swap named as sched2 T-14 tie between insns 106/117 (both pri=2 ashlsi3) broken by insn-number ordering; region-3 named as reorg pass-1 fill_simple_delay_slots on check2-beqz steali

s7 forensics: jump2 DOES create young labels (591/301/85 post-greg) — mechanism is real in this compiler, but lands at check1's copy-skip position, not check2's; s6 frontier item #1 KILLED with insn-l
s8 rederive: three structurally distinct do_timeout shapes measured KILLED — quantifies load-bearing cost of vT40's t0-web decomposition (+12), pp pointer-alias (+12), and t0 address-value type (+7).
s9 rederive: 4 structurally novel C shapes measured KILLED (9/11/18/7); quantifies pp-alias-only-with-named-locals recovery at 7 masked pts (16 -> 9) vs the s8 pp+web joint 12.

s10 synthesis: partial-web probes measured (v01 arg5-only=13, v02 t0-only=6); quantifies each staging component's independent contribution; frontier reset to twin-first, permuter, and pair-window wrap

frontier.hypothesis: The twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 (parked, dist 7, 5 rules) shares the pair-swap coupling; solving its cheaper exchange residual FIRST yields a directly transferable lever per fable-blitz 2026-07-07 ruling. It has been the standing next-step for 3+ sessions and has not been dispatched.
frontier.mechanism: Twin's ip/g3 residual is the exchange alone (masked ~6->0 on flip per pre-merge sessions 6f-6h commits aa8cad24 cd65f9c2 e5aa2dd4 f4bc8e67 df749bfd 622620cb). Any pair-exchange technique landing there transfers to marionation_Exec's do_timeout region.
frontier.next_probe: Route the queue such that cpu_side_move_dir_4 gets its own grind session before another marionation_Exec permuter campaign. Not this function's session.

frontier.hypothesis: A single unified staging expression (both webs collapsed into ONE aggregate temp, e.g., a struct-like or self-referential cast) may capture the coupled t0/v0-web interaction that partial forms cannot.
frontier.mechanism: s10 proved non-additivity: t0-web and v0-web are CONDITIONALLY beneficial (arg5-web negative alone, additive only with t0-web). vT40's floor 4 needs both simultaneously. This is the mechanistic signature of a compound expression where one sub-expression sets up the register state the other consumes - untested in the ledger's decomposed forms. e.g., `t0 = (s32*)((u8*)tbl_125c + (idx_1494[0]<<2)); v0 = idx_1494[1]<<2; arg5=(s32*)((u8*)tbl_125c+v0);` sharing a lifted (u8*)tbl_125c pseudo could birth a shared address-base qty.
frontier.next_probe: Sweep 4-6 unified-staging spellings: (i) both derefs indexed off a single lifted (u8*)tbl_base local; (ii) idx-arithmetic (idx*4, idx+1, idx*4+4) sharing a common shift/add tree; (iii) pointer-typed tbl_125c index with expression-level fused ptr+shift. Measure vs vT40=4.

frontier.hypothesis: The rich-pass permuter sampler with EXPLICIT PERM_* directives on the pair-window insns (106/117 sll pair) and region-3 (check2-beqz slot) - a shape untried since s5's undirected campaign - finds a semantically-clean sub-4 form.
frontier.mechanism: s5's ~10k undirected iterations found only masked-3 signposts paying +1 insn. Directed PERM_GENERAL/PERM_RANDOMIZE_TYPE around the specific tie-breaking insns concentrates search where the mechanism actually lives. s6 forensics gave the exact insn UIDs to target; that information was not available to the s5 sampler.
frontier.next_probe: Permuter modality session: rebuild offset-0 workspace, seed with vT40 base, insert PERM_GENERAL between the arg4val/arg5val statements + PERM_RANDOMIZE_TYPE on the check block, run --stop-on-zero -j24 with watcher auto-triaging sub-200 finds. Reject any find that reads status uninitialized or adds net insns.

judge_constraints: FINAL owner ruling 2026-07-06 (do-while-zero-exception.md): do-while(0) sanctioned for ANY codegen effect incl. RA weighting, mandatory inline FAKE annotation; nested wraps additionally need a single-level-insufficient justification. The interim not-sanctioned ruling is superseded. STILL FORBIDDEN: regfix, register pins, __asm__ injection, semantic-lie C (cross-symbol derivation, per 2026-07-05).

candidate.c = vT40 (masked 4, verified): layer-1 review round-3 verdict was PASS-except-one — the NESTED wrap at line ~111 was held NEEDS_USER at the time; under the FINAL ruling it needs a documented single-level-insufficient justification (vT44 battery was staged to eliminate it entirely — check evidence). The Judge must independently verify that justification or its elimination.

Residual gap is 2 root-caused items (see evidence: pair-swap @56/57 coupled fixed point — sched2 LUID tie + qty_compare 5.33v5.33 tie; wrap toolbox measured DEAD for this pair). Do NOT re-derive the 140-ordering sweep, the 9-variant topology sweep, or the cc1psx parity test — all closed negative. Active lever at handoff: rich-pass permuter on the vT40 base.

STRATEGY (fable-blitz 2026-07-07): develop the exchange lever on the CHEAPER twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 FIRST (its ip/g3 residual is the exchange alone; masked ~6->0 on flip), then mirror here. The decisive allocation-equation material is in pre-merge commits aa8cad24 cd65f9c2 e5aa2dd4 f4bc8e67 df749bfd 622620cb (sessions 6f-6h: in-place basin correction, final qty_compare equation, s4 half-flip) — NOT fully represented in this ledger's s1-s3; read those commits before another permuter campaign.
